theme.description: A warm, tactile, and highly functional dashboard designed for Protofino bakery. Blending the precision of a modern POS with the organic warmth of a bakery environment. Eliminating sterile 'SaaS White' in favor of warm paper and sand tones.

mono.description: Use for all numerical data, stock counts, and totals to ensure column alignment and technical precision.

hierarchy_rules: H1 (Dashboard Title): text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tight font-semibold

layouts.structure: Modified F-pattern. Collapsible or minimal left/top navigation, with 'North Star' summary metrics in the top-left quadrant.
layouts.spacing: Generous outer padding (p-8 to p-12 on containers), but tight internal data density (gap-4 to gap-6) for rapid data entry.
layouts.grid_strategy: High Density Grid. Summary cards span 1 column, while the main inventory list spans full width. Use 'bento' principles for summary widgets.

surface_styles.cards: Subtle roundness (max 8px border-radius). Flat background (surface color), 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow by default. Hover states introduce slight lift (-translate-y-1) and delicate ambient shadow.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped or slightly rounded (8px). Primary buttons use Deep Ochre. Must include hover states (lighten hue) and active states (scale down slightly).
components.inputs: Solid surface backgrounds (not transparent). 1px border. Focus state must have a higher contrast ring (2px solid Primary). Use Shadcn input with these customized colors.
components.data_entry_table: Given 10 fixed products, use a dense, grid-based list format where users can tab through inputs rapidly. Columns: Product Name, Shelf, BS Boxes, BS Loose, Delivery, Total. Use monospace for numbers.
components.history_panel: Use Shadcn Sheet (slide-out panel) or Tabs for viewing past counts. Do not navigate away from the main counting context.
components.toasts: Use Sonner for success/save notifications. Position bottom-right.

motion.interactions: Hover states on all interactive elements. Focus rings on inputs. Staggered entrance animations for the product list rows (e.g., framer-motion staggerChildren).
motion.transitions: Use specific properties: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease. NO 'transition: all'.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG AA standards, especially on primary buttons.
accessibility.focus: Clear focus rings on all inputs and buttons for keyboard navigation (crucial for data-entry speed).
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='save-count-button', data-testid='product-row-panaji-naan').

images.description: Warm lit bakery shelves. Use as a subtle, heavily faded background for the header or empty states.

media.icons: Use lucide-react. Keep stroke-width to 1.5 or 2 for clarity.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page Dashboard application for Protofino Bakery stock counting.
Implement the 10 fixed bakery products with their respective 'qty per box' rules.
Create a grid/table layout for the products allowing inline editing of: Shelf, Backstock Boxes, Loose Pieces, and Delivery.
Auto-calculate the total per product: Shelf + (BS Boxes * QtyPerBox) + BS Loose + Delivery.
Display a Summary Section showing aggregate totals.
Include a 'Save Count' button that persists the current state with a timestamp to localStorage.
Include a 'History' view (Sheet or separate view) to see past saved counts.
Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings; apply 'Work Sans'. Use 'IBM Plex Mono' for numbers.
Apply the warm, organic color palette detailed in the theme section via Tailwind config.
Avoid generic centered layouts. Left-align data and forms for functional speed.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not converge toward generic 'AI slop' aesthetics (boring gradients, centered everything).
Create depth through layered design elements and subtle borders instead of heavy shadows.
DO NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
NEVER use placeholder URLs or AI emoji characters for icons.
Prioritize using pre-existing Shadcn components from src/components/ui, customizing their Tailwind classes to match the theme.
